title: Room on the Broom 60358 Dragon 6-inch Soft Toy
features: From the best-selling children's book The Room on the Broom by author Julia Donaldson and Alex Scheffler
Adorable Dragon Soft Toy, perfect present for children.
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
description: Product Description This adorable soft toy is based on the Dragon character from the Room on the Broom books which is from the creator of The Gruffalo, author Julia Donaldson and illustrator Alex Scheffler. The witch and cat fly happily over forests, rivers and Mountains on their broomstick until a stormy wind blows away the witcher's hat, bow and wand. They are retrieved by a dog, bird and frog and each animal asks for a ride on the broom. One after the next they climb on until the broom is so heavy that it snaps in two! What will happen next as they tumble into a bog and meet a greedy Dragon? Bedtime reading becomes fun with this fabulous Room on the Broom Dragon. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Box Contains 1 x Room On The Broom Dragon
